API Documentation¶

This section documents the REST API views and serializers in the news application.

API Views¶

REST API views for news application.

class news.api_views.ArticleListAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListCreateAPIView

API view for listing and creating articles.

serializer_class¶

alias of ArticleSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Filter articles based on user role and subscriptions.

perform_create(serializer)[source]¶

Set the author to the current user.

class news.api_views.ArticleDetailAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: RetrieveUpdateDestroyAPIView

API view for retrieving, updating, and deleting articles.

serializer_class¶

alias of ArticleSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Filter articles based on user role.

class news.api_views.PublisherListAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListAPIView

API view for listing publishers.

queryset = <QuerySet [<Publisher: Tech News Daily>, <Publisher: World Affairs>]>¶
serializer_class¶

alias of PublisherSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
class news.api_views.CategoryListAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListAPIView

API view for listing categories.

queryset = <QuerySet [<Category: Technology>, <Category: World News>]>¶
serializer_class¶

alias of CategorySerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
class news.api_views.NewsletterListAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListCreateAPIView

API view for listing and creating newsletters.

serializer_class¶

alias of NewsletterSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Filter newsletters based on user role.

perform_create(serializer)[source]¶

Set the author to the current user.

class news.api_views.SubscriptionListAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListCreateAPIView

API view for listing and creating subscriptions.

serializer_class¶

alias of SubscriptionSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Return subscriptions for the current user.

perform_create(serializer)[source]¶

Set the user to the current user.

class news.api_views.SubscriptionDetailAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: RetrieveDestroyAPIView

API view for retrieving and deleting subscriptions.

serializer_class¶

alias of SubscriptionSerializer

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Return subscriptions for the current user.

news.api_views.approve_article_api(request, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

API endpoint for approving articles (editors only).

news.api_views.user_subscriptions_api(request, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

API endpoint for getting user’s subscribed content.

API Functions¶

news.api_views.approve_article_api(request, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

API endpoint for approving articles (editors only).

news.api_views.user_subscriptions_api(request, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

API endpoint for getting user’s subscribed content.

Serializers¶

Serializers for news application REST API.

class news.serializers.UserSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for User model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta options for UserSerializer.

model¶

alias of User

fields = ['id', 'username', 'email', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'role', 'date_joined', 'is_active']¶
read_only_fields = ['id', 'date_joined']¶
class news.serializers.CategorySerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for Category model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta options for CategorySerializer.

model¶

alias of Category

fields = ['id', 'name', 'description']¶
class news.serializers.PublisherSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for Publisher model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta options for PublisherSerializer.

model¶

alias of Publisher

fields = ['id', 'name', 'description', 'website', 'created_at']¶
read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at']¶
class news.serializers.ArticleSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for Article model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta options for ArticleSerializer.

model¶

alias of Article

fields = ['id', 'title', 'content', 'summary', 'author', 'publisher', 'category', 'status', 'is_approved', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'published_at', 'author_id', 'publisher_id', 'category_id']¶
read_only_fields = ['id', 'is_approved', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'published_at']¶
create(validated_data)[source]¶

Create article with proper author assignment.

update(instance, validated_data)[source]¶

Update article with proper field handling.

class news.serializers.NewsletterSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for Newsletter model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta options for NewsletterSerializer.

model¶

alias of Newsletter

fields = ['id', 'title', 'content', 'author', 'publisher', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'author_id', 'publisher_id']¶
read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at', 'updated_at']¶
create(validated_data)[source]¶

Create newsletter with proper author assignment.

class news.serializers.SubscriptionSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Serializer for Subscription model.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta class for Subscription model.

model¶

alias of Subscription

fields = ['id', 'user', 'publisher', 'journalist', 'created_at', 'user_id', 'publisher_id', 'journalist_id']¶
read_only_fields = ['id', 'created_at']¶
validate(data)[source]¶

Validate that either publisher or journalist is selected.

create(validated_data)[source]¶

Create subscription with proper field assignment.

class news.serializers.ArticleListSerializer(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ModelSerializer

Simplified serializer for article lists.

class Meta[source]¶

Bases: object

Meta class for ArticleListSerializer.

model¶

alias of Article

fields = ['id', 'title', 'summary', 'author_name', 'publisher_name', 'category_name', 'status', 'created_at', 'published_at']¶
